summary: Completed backend + frontend testing for requested QS semi-automatic estimation workflow on public preview URL. Verified auto-generation, editable recalculation, BOQ linkage/save, schedule output, weather fallback behavior, export actions, revision flow, and navigation regression pages.
action_items: Optional maintainability: split /app/frontend/src/pages/QSEstimatorPage.jsx into smaller modules/components (currently very large).
Optional maintainability: split /app/backend/server.py into routers/services for better long-term maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: No runtime defects found in scoped features.
File size concern: /app/frontend/src/pages/QSEstimatorPage.jsx exceeds 700 lines; refactor into focused components.
File size concern: /app/backend/server.py exceeds 700 lines; split into modular routers/services.
No MOCKED APIs used in this run.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_QS_* project/version and related rows through UI/API during this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://buildcalc-estimate.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest pass: 10/10 for QS + weather fallback tests. Frontend validated end-to-end on /estimate including auto-generate, edit recalculation, BOQ save/regenerate, schedule rows, weather fallback (missing OPENWEATHER_API_KEY), export actions/logging, and regression nav pages loading.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in scoped flows. Weather fallback message is expected because OPENWEATHER_API_KEY is intentionally blank; backend returns graceful response with has_api_key=false and empty forecast_days.
